body.title: CLOSED: Move Igor-specific CC rules to path-scoped .claude/rules/igor/ directory
body.result: .claude/rules/cognition.md + memory.md created in TheIgors — HIGH-inertia files, key invariants, in-flight primitives load when editing those subsystems; root CLAUDE.md stays at 90 lines (6705f485)
body.description:
Extract Igor-specific rules from CLAUDE.md/global CC settings into path-scoped files under `.claude/rules/`. Path-scoped rules load only when files matching the path pattern are edited. Goal: reduce per-session context load for non-Igor work. Identify rule sections that only apply when working in `~/TheIgors/` paths, extract to `.claude/rules/igor/*.md`. Move only — no content changes. CLAUDE.md stays under 200 lines after extraction.

**Affected files:** `/home/akien/.claude/CLAUDE.md` or user settings (rules extracted), `.claude/rules/igor/*.md` (new)
**Design rules:** move only, no rule content changes; verify rules still load for Igor work; verify they don't load for agent_datacenter-only work
**Scope boundary:** IN — rule extraction and path-scoping, verification. OUT — no new rules, no content changes.
**Test plan:** .claude/rules/igor/ rules appear in CC context when editing TheIgors file; absent when editing agent_datacenter file; CLAUDE.md < 200 lines after
